name: recom
tagline: Powering Innovation with High-Quality DC-DC Converters and Power Supplies
description: Recom is a leading European manufacturer of high-quality DC-DC converters, AC-DC power supplies, and LED drivers. With over 40 years of experience, Recom delivers reliable power solutions for industrial, medical, automotive, and renewable energy applications.
longDescription: Recom Power GmbH, founded in 1974 and headquartered in Gmunden, Austria, is a premier European manufacturer of power conversion products. The company specializes in developing and producing high-quality DC-DC converters, AC-DC power supplies, switching regulators, and LED drivers. Recom's product portfolio spans from compact 1W DC-DC converters to high-power 500W+ AC-DC supplies, serving diverse markets including industrial automation, medical devices, automotive electronics, renewable energy, and telecommunications. Known for exceptional reliability, efficiency, and compact design, Recom products meet stringent international standards including UL, CE, and medical safety certifications. The company's commitment to innovation and quality has made it a trusted partner for engineers worldwide seeking dependable power solutions.

coreProducts.name: DC-DC Converters
coreProducts.description: High-efficiency DC-DC converters from 1W to 60W in SIP, DIP, and SMD packages for isolated and non-isolated applications.

coreProducts.name: AC-DC Power Supplies
coreProducts.description: Compact AC-DC power supplies from 5W to 500W with universal input and high efficiency for industrial and medical applications.

coreProducts.name: Switching Regulators
coreProducts.description: High-efficiency switching regulators and POL converters for point-of-load applications with minimal external components.

coreProducts.name: LED Drivers
coreProducts.description: Constant current and constant voltage LED drivers for general lighting, automotive, and industrial LED applications.

industries.name: Industrial Automation
industries.description: Reliable power solutions for PLCs, sensors, actuators, and industrial control systems with wide temperature ranges.

industries.name: Medical Devices
industries.description: Medical-grade power supplies meeting IEC 60601-1 standards for patient safety and equipment reliability.

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: Automotive-qualified DC-DC converters for EVs, infotainment, and ADAS systems with AEC-Q100 compliance.

industries.name: Renewable Energy
industries.description: High-efficiency power solutions for solar inverters, energy storage, and smart grid applications.

certifications.name: ISO 9001
certifications.description: Quality management system certification ensuring consistent product quality and customer satisfaction.

certifications.name: ISO 14001
certifications.description: Environmental management system certification demonstrating commitment to environmental responsibility.

certifications.name: IEC 60601-1
certifications.description: Medical electrical equipment safety standard for patient and operator protection.

certifications.name: AEC-Q100
certifications.description: Automotive electronics council qualification for integrated circuits in automotive applications.

seoTitle: Recom Power Supplies Distributor | DC-DC Converters & AC-DC Power Supplies
seoDescription: Authorized Recom distributor offering DC-DC converters, AC-DC power supplies, switching regulators, and LED drivers. Technical support and competitive pricing for industrial, medical, and automotive applications.

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized distributor of Recom products?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is an authorized distributor of Recom power conversion products. We provide genuine Recom DC-DC converters, AC-DC power supplies, switching regulators, and LED drivers with full manufacturer warranty and technical support. Our authorization ensures customers receive authentic products with traceability, quality assurance, and access to the latest product releases and technical documentation. We maintain inventory of popular Recom products and can support both prototype quantities and high-volume production requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us for Recom product availability, pricing, and technical documentation. We can also provide samples for evaluation.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of Recom DC-DC converters?
faqs.answer: Recom DC-DC converters offer several key advantages: 1) High efficiency - up to 90% efficiency reducing heat generation; 2) Compact size - industry-leading power density in SIP and DIP packages; 3) Wide input range - many models support 4:1 input voltage ranges; 4) Medical safety - 2xMOPP isolation for patient safety applications; 5) Wide temperature range - operation from -40°C to +85°C without derating; 6) Long lifetime - designed for 20+ years MTBF. These characteristics make Recom converters ideal for demanding industrial, medical, and automotive applications where reliability and space are critical.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for detailed technical comparisons and application-specific recommendations for Recom DC-DC converters.

faqs.question: How do Recom medical power supplies meet safety requirements?
faqs.answer: Recom medical power supplies are designed to meet IEC 60601-1 3rd edition safety standards for medical electrical equipment. Key safety features include: 2xMOPP (Means of Patient Protection) isolation - providing two independent protection systems between mains and patient; Low leakage current - typically <100μA meeting CF (cardiac floating) application requirements; Isolation voltage - 4000VAC or higher input-to-output isolation; EMI compliance - meeting EN 55011/CISPR 11 Class B for medical environments. Recom medical products undergo rigorous testing including dielectric withstand, insulation resistance, and leakage current verification. These power supplies are suitable for patient-connected equipment, diagnostic devices, and life-support systems.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for medical power supply selection guidance and safety standard compliance documentation.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Recom products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for Recom products vary based on product type and order quantity: Standard catalog products (popular DC-DC converters and AC-DC supplies): 2-4 weeks from factory; Custom or modified standard products: 6-8 weeks including special testing; High-volume production orders: 4-6 weeks with scheduled deliveries; Samples and small quantities: 1-2 weeks from distributor stock. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo maintains inventory of popular Recom products for immediate delivery. For production requirements, we recommend establishing forecasts and supply agreements to ensure continuous supply. Contact us for current lead times and inventory availability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for current lead times and to discuss inventory programs for your production requirements.

faqs.question: Does Recom offer automotive-qualified products?
faqs.answer: Yes, Recom offers a comprehensive range of automotive-qualified DC-DC converters meeting AEC-Q100 and AEC-Q200 standards. The automotive product portfolio includes: R-78 series - buck regulators for 12V/24V automotive systems; RECOM RxxPxx series - isolated DC-DC converters for EV battery management; R-REF series - reference designs for automotive applications. All automotive products are manufactured in IATF 16949 certified facilities and undergo rigorous reliability testing including temperature cycling, mechanical shock, and vibration testing. Recom automotive products are deployed in production vehicles for infotainment, ADAS, and powertrain applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us for automotive product specifications, qualification reports, and PPAP documentation.

faqs.question: What technical support does BeiLuo provide for Recom products?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive technical support for Recom products including: Application engineering support - power supply design, thermal analysis, and system optimization; Product selection guidance - helping choose the right modules for your specific requirements; Evaluation support - providing development tools, evaluation boards, and application notes; EMC/EMI consulting - assistance with meeting electromagnetic compatibility requirements; Supply chain support - forecasting, inventory planning, and long-term supply agreements. Our FAE team has extensive experience with power electronics design and can provide valuable insights for optimizing your designs with Recom products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Reach out to our technical support team for assistance with your Recom-based design projects.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Recom DC-DC converter for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Recom DC-DC converter involves several key steps: 1) Input voltage - determine your input voltage range and select a converter with appropriate input range (consider 2:1 or 4:1 input options); 2) Output voltage/current - calculate required output power and select converter with adequate margin (typically 20-30%); 3) Isolation requirements - choose isolated or non-isolated based on system grounding and safety needs; 4) Package type - select SIP, DIP, or SMD based on board space and assembly process; 5) Temperature range - ensure converter rating matches your operating environment; 6) Certifications - verify required safety certifications (medical, automotive, etc.). Recom provides online selection tools and detailed datasheets to assist with selection.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our product selector or contact FAE for application-specific recommendations and thermal analysis.
